svg.aria-label: Antique chart of The Scattered Isles of Nulo, an archipelago in a temperate climate.
svg.title: The Scattered Isles of Nulo
svg.desc: Antique chart of The Scattered Isles of Nulo, an archipelago in a temperate climate.
svg.metadata: Vellum chart. Recipe: seed=55533 type=archipelago band=temperate land=0.24 grid=320x240 style=antique engine=0.1.0

g.text: Being a true & faithful chart of these waters, as surveyed
by Kau the Wayfarer in the year 1290 of the Iron Age
